creator: cjpm@gmx.es
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #1)
> From what I understand from
> 
>  http://docbook.org/tdg/
> 
> 2.0.17-x is the unexpanded version of 2.0.17. So maybe instead of an update,
> would it be possible to provide an option which version the user wants to
> build/install ?

Good catch :)

> 
> Either 2.0.17 or 2.0.17-x ?

I'll redo the patch to include both of them.
